ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "complexity" REAL /* Complexity of the dataset (e.g., number of features, number of samples) */,
  "distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of the dataset (e.g., normal, uniform) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public repository, in-house) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is available */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the algorithm (e.g., clustering, classification, regression) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author or team who developed the algorithm */,
  "paper_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the research paper or documentation */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of dependencies (e.g., libraries) required to run the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_structures" (
  "data_structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data structure */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data structure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data structure */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the data structure (e.g., tree, graph, array) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data structure */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data structure was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data structure was last updated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the author or team who developed the data structure */,
  "paper_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the research paper or documentation */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of dependencies (e.g., libraries) required to use the data structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmarking run */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the run */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the run */,
  "data_structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data structure used in the run */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the run */,
  "tree_weight" REAL /* Weight of the tree in the run */,
  "max_op" INTEGER /* Maximum number of operations in the run */,
  "num_points_inserted" INTEGER /* Number of points inserted in the run */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration of the run */,
  "add_points_res" INTEGER /* Result of adding points in the run */,
  "update_index_res" INTEGER /* Result of updating the index in the run */,
  "update_table_res" INTEGER /* Result of updating the table in the run */,
  "add_points_elapsed" REAL /* Time taken to add points in the run */,
  "update_index_elapsed" REAL /* Time taken to update the index in the run */,
  "update_table_elapsed" REAL /* Time taken to update the table in the run */,
  "mean_dist_error" REAL /* Mean distance error in the run */,
  "update_elapsed" REAL /* Total time taken to update in the run */,
  "query_elapsed" REAL /* Time taken to query in the run */,
  "qps" REAL /* Queries per second in the run */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Coverage of the run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment details (e.g., hardware, software) where the run was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_data_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_structure_id") REFERENCES data_structures ("data_structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Additional contact information (e.g., phone number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking run accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES benchmark_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the algorithm version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_structure_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data structure version */,
  "data_structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data structure */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data structure */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the data structure version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_structure_versions_data_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_structure_id") REFERENCES data_structures ("data_structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the dataset version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking run */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being measured (e.g., time, memory, accuracy) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., seconds, MB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES benchmark_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result version */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the result */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the result version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_versions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmarking run */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the run (e.g., clustering, classification) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES benchmark_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tag_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag version */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the tag */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the tag version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog or release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_versions_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)
